title: JPEGMAFIA Music Discs
description: Adds 10 Music Discs of Songs by JPEGMAFIA
body:
This mod is quite simple. It adds 10 music discs with songs by producer/rapper JPEGMAFIA (one of them is actually Redveil's song). There are no structures for the discs yet, but they are all craftable.

♫♪.ılılıll|̲̅̅○̲̅̅|̲̅̅=̲̅̅|̲̅̅○̲̅̅|llılılı.♫♪
